channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Gross-Simbabwe: Inside the Stone City of Great Zimbabwe
item.description: via AD HOC NEWS #Zimbabwe #Culture #ZimbabweCulture #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: AD HOC NEWS

item.title: United States, Canada embassies kickstart World Cup party Harare @NewsDayZimbabwe
item.description: via NewsDay Zimbabwe #Zimbabwe #Culture #ZimbabweCulture #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: NewsDay Zimbabwe

item.title: Mining surge set to unlock dividend bonanza for Mutapa @NewsDayZimbabwe
item.description: via NewsDay Zimbabwe #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: NewsDay Zimbabwe

item.title: Zimbabwe Moves to Regulate Crypto: Mandatory Registration, $500 Fees and FIU Oversight
item.description: Crypto firms in Zimbabwe must now register each year with the Financial Intelligence Unit and pay a $500 fee, or face criminal charges. The country’s first comprehensive virtual-asset framework, and a shift from the 2018 banking ban toward formal oversight. via Tendai Kuwanda #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Tendai Kuwanda

item.title: Mutapa Gold declares US$35m first dividend @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Mutapa Gold declares US$35m first dividend – herald Nelson Gahadza Senior Business Reporter MUTAPA Gold Resources has declared a maiden dividend of US$35 million for the nine months to December 31, 2025, following a strong financial and operational performance. The compan via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: WWF Zimbabwe Launches 2026–2030 Strategic Plan and Responsible Mining Initiativ @thezimbabwean
item.description: “We Cannot Mine Our Way into Development if We Mine Our Ecosystems Out of Existence” –Itai Chibaya WWF Zimbabwe Country Coordinator. via The Zimbabwean #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwean

item.title: After saving her children from fire, mother pleads for help @zimsituation
item.description: Source: After saving her children from fire, mother pleads for help — CITEZW A Bulawayo mother who smashed a window with her bare hands to rescue her children from a raging fire is appealing for public assistance after the blaze destroyed nearly all of the family’s belongings. Po via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Outgoing UK envoy Pete Vowles salutes Harare
item.description: Herald Reporter OUTGOING British Ambassador to Zimbabwe Pete Vowles used King Charles III’s birthday celebrations in Harare on Thursday to thank Zimbabweans for their partnership and reflect on what he… #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Herald

item.title: Treasury opens floor for public input on 2026 Mid-Term Budget review and 2027 Strategy
item.description: THE Ministry of Finance, Economic Development and Investment Promotion has called on citizens, businesses, labour unions and civil society to submit proposals for the 2026 Mid-Term Budget and Economic Review and the upcoming 2027 Budget Strategy Paper. In a public notice issued t via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Junior Social Media Assistant — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Editorial Coordinator — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Pitch, draft and edit original explainers. Bring fresh editorial angles. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Data Analyst — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Turn Zimbabwe public data into clear visual stories. Bring new data ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Business Development Associate — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Open doors for advertisers, sponsors and partners across the Zim diaspora corridor. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
